content.en:
There are many opportunities in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and as time goes by, more opportunities will be born in the future.

If the Xuanxu Holy Realm becomes the Ancestral Realm, there will be more opportunities, and even chances and treasures that will help the ancestors will be born.

However, it takes time for the Xuanxu Saint Realm to grow, and now that the Saint Realm wants to evolve into the Ancestral Realm, I don't know how many years it will take, Ye Tian can't wait forever, it's too long.

He wants to use the opportunity to condense the Holy Soul, he can't count on the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and he must find a new opportunity.

In the blink of an eye, another 10 million years have passed.

At this time, the Holy Monument World had an average effect on many domain ancestors, or even almost no effect.

In addition to the Terran Domain Ancestors, many of the Domain Ancestors of other forces have left the Holy Monument World.

For example, the light-clothed saintess and others left the Xuanxu Holy Realm and returned to the Dark Holy Realm.

For them, it was undoubtedly a waste of time to continue to stay in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, because the Holy Monument was almost the biggest opportunity in a Holy Realm, and the chances after that were very ordinary.

They didn't know that the Xuanxu Holy Realm could be promoted to the Ancestral Realm, so they had no expectations for the Xuanxu Holy Realm, so naturally they wouldn't stay.

And the domain ancestors of the battle gate also left one by one, and even the eight invincible domain ancestors of the war gate also left one by one.

After all, there was no need for them to stay here, and there were still many things in the Dark Sacred Realm, and there was even an opportunity that belonged to them, and it was already very good that they could stay in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm for so long.

In the next few hundred thousand years, the domain ancestors of other forces were almost gone, and only a few domain ancestors still stayed in the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

The human world.

Ye Tian was listening to the situation reported by the temple.

"Lord of the Ten Thousand Law Domains, this is the progress of the Terran Domain Ancestors!"

The new Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Terran Race, one of the guardians of the Temple, reported to the Lanyu Domain Ancestor.

Ye Tian took a look at it, and he was also very satisfied with the progress of the Terran Domain Ancestor.

The human race now has about one million domain ancestors, more than 30,000 top domain ancestors, and 500 strongest domain ancestors, all of whom were promoted from the Holy Monument World.

In the Holy Tablet World, their soul refining speed is very fast, and they have made great progress, plus there is no shortage of cultivation resources, and the Holy Tablet World can increase their cultivation speed, so they can be promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor one by one.

500 Supreme Domain Ancestors, ordinary sects do not have such a scale.

Some weak sects only have dozens of supreme domain ancestors, one or two invincible domain ancestors, and that's it.

One can imagine how much progress the Terrans have made at present.

The human race has grown so much in a short period of time, and it already has the ability to completely control the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

this day.

In the Terran Temple, Ye Tian summoned hundreds of Supreme Domain Ancestors and opened a Terran meeting.

One by one, the Terran Supreme Domain Ancestors descended to the temple, and they were all curious, not knowing what to say about this meeting.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian descended to the temple and looked at the ancestors of the Supreme Domain around him.

"This meeting is about the control of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, the Xuanxu Holy Realm is now the territory of our human race, but because there were not many Terran domain ancestors before, and there were more domain ancestors of other forces in the Daoshan Realm, there was no way to completely block the Xuanxu Holy Realm. But now, with millions of ancestors in the Terran Domain, I propose to block the Xuanxu Holy Realm, just like those holy places and holy gates in the Dark Sacred Domain, the headquarters does not allow others to enter. "

Ye Tian proposed.

At this time, Qinghe Domain Ancestor, one of the strongest domain ancestors of the human race, spoke: "Lord Wanfa Domain Ancestor, once we block the Xuanxu Holy Realm, other forces will inevitably resist, and the Battle Realm Tower of the Xuanxu Holy Realm is a place of opportunity for many domain ancestors and half-step domain ancestors, blocking the Xuanxu Saint Realm, they can't enter the Battle Realm Tower, I'm afraid they will unite to suppress our human race in the area outside the Xuanxu Holy Realm!"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "They don't dare to suppress, there are not even a few Supreme Domain Ancestors, how dare they suppress our human race." Moreover, it's not like I'm not denying them access to the Warworld Tower. A world passage can be opened to go directly to the Warworld Void, which is still a public area. Except for the Void of the War Realm, all other places are sealed off and no outsiders are allowed to enter. I also did this for the sake of the human race, otherwise some treasures will be born in the future, and other forces will come to snatch them, and even cause the domain ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary, which is not a good thing. If the Xuanxu Holy Realm is blocked, the other domain ancestors will not be able to perceive what treasures have been born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, even if there is an amazing opportunity, it will only belong to our human race!"

"I agree with Lord Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor's suggestion!"

"I agree!"

"Agreed!"

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors agreed very much, many opportunities originally belonged to the human race, but they were snatched away by the domain ancestors of other forces, and they were also very depressed.

Before, the strength of the human race was weak, and there was no way.

But now, almost all the domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Realm are gone, and the rest are some weak people, so they have the strength to block the Xuanxu Saint Realm and monopolize the various opportunities of the Xuanxu Saint Realm in the future.

Most of the domain ancestors agreed, and Ye Tian gave this order.

At the same time, Ye Tian began to use the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to build a monstrous array all over the Xuanxu Saint Realm to block the Xuanxu Saint Realm, even the strongest domain ancestor could not easily enter the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Soon, many domain ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm began to summon Ye Tian.

"Alliance Master, why aren't you allowed to enter the Xuanxu Saint Realm?"

"Alliance Leader, why did you drive us Domain Ancestors out of the Xuanxu Saint Realm?"

"Alliance leader, such a move by the Terrans is a bit excessive!"

......

For the interrogation of these domain ancestors, Ye Tian only had one sentence: This is my order!

No matter how dissatisfied and angry those domain ancestors were, Ye Tian still carried out this plan.

There is no way, others don't know the situation in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, but Ye Tian knows it very well.

The Xuanxu Holy Realm has been growing, and I am afraid that more opportunities will be born in the future, once the Xuanxu Holy Realm is not blocked, I am afraid that this secret will be revealed.

Originally, the Holy Monument was the greatest opportunity of a Holy Realm, but for the Xuanxu Holy Realm, the Holy Monument was definitely not the greatest opportunity.

Therefore, taking advantage of the departure of the domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Realm, he hurriedly blocked the Xuanxu Sacred Realm, which would not lead to the leakage of chances, even if more great chances were born, it would also belong to the internal affairs of the human race.

Time passed slowly, and after Ye Tian completely blocked the Xuanxu Saint Realm, other domain ancestors could not enter the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

At first, they were making trouble, but slowly they accepted it.

In addition, there are some opportunities in the Daoshan realm, and even many natural realms and some precious treasures have been born, which has also attracted the attention of these domain ancestors.

And just like that, millions of years passed.

this day.

A message came from the battle gate, which made Ye Tian excited.
